data.name: AirConnectivityIndexDesc
data.value: It measures how connected a country is to global air travel, showing access to destinations and international mobility.

data.name: AirQualityDesc
data.value: It shows how clean or polluted the air people breathe daily is, helping to understand the impacts on health, well-being, and quality of life.

data.name: AnnualTemperatureDesc
data.value: It shows the average temperature throughout the year in a country, helping to understand the prevailing climate and thermal comfort for living or traveling.

data.name: CensorshipIndexDesc
data.value: Measures how free people are to access and share information, including the extent of restrictions on media, ideas, and online content.

data.name: CorruptionScoreDesc
data.value: Shows how honest people believe their leaders and public officials are, helping to understand how trust and fairness work in a country.

data.name: DMDemocracyIndexDesc
data.value: Evaluates how open and fair a country's political system is, including how people participate in choosing leaders and influencing decisions.

data.name: EconomicFreedomIndexDesc
data.value: Indicates how much people and businesses can make economic choices freely, including starting businesses, trading, and using resources, which affects growth and prosperity.

data.name: EconomistDemocracyIndexDesc
data.value: Measures how well citizens can vote, express opinions freely, enjoy rights, and participate in a government that is accountable and fair.

data.name: FreedomExpressionIndexDesc
data.value: Indicates how freely people can discuss ideas, politics, and culture, and how independent media and educational spaces are in sharing opinions.

data.name: FreedomScoreDesc
data.value: Shows how much political rights and civil liberties people enjoy, including voting, speaking freely, and participating in society without fear.

data.name: GDP_NominalDesc
data.value: Shows the total value of goods and services produced per person in a country, measured in current US dollars, helping to compare countries' economies globally.

data.name: GDP_PPPDesc
data.value: Measures the average economic output per person in a country, adjusted for differences in cost of living, showing how much people can buy and their relative standard of living.

data.name: GlobalPeaceIndexDesc
data.value: Indicates how peaceful a country is, considering safety, conflict levels, and social stability, to show how calm or tense life can be in that country.

data.name: GlobalTerrorismIndexDesc
data.value: Measures the impact of terrorism on a country, including incidents, injuries, and fatalities, giving a sense of how likely such events are to affect daily life.

data.name: HappinessIndexDesc
data.value: Indicates how happy people feel in their daily life, considering their well-being, opportunities, community, and quality of life.

data.name: HDIDesc
data.value: Measures how well people can live healthy lives, gain education, and have a decent standard of living, showing overall human development.

data.name: HealthCareIndexDesc
data.value: It assesses the quality of and access to a country's health services, including factors such as medical infrastructure, care, and availability of professionals.

data.name: NumbeoPollutionIndexDesc
data.value: Indicates the level of pollution in a city or country, including air, water, noise, waste, and overall cleanliness, helping to understand how healthy the environment is.

data.name: NumbeoSafetyIndexDesc
data.value: Estimates the overall level of crime in a city or country, helping to understand how safe everyday life is for residents and visitors.

data.name: OECDDesc
data.value: Shows whether a country is part of an international group where nations share knowledge, ideas, and strategies to improve public policies and economic practices.

data.name: ReturnTicket
data.value: Proof of Return or Onward Ticket

data.name: SustainableMobilityIndexDesc
data.value: It assesses how efficiently, safely, and sustainably people can move, considering transport access and mobility quality.

data.name: TourismIndexDesc
data.value: Measures how well a country supports travel and tourism, including facilities, policies, and opportunities, showing how easy and enjoyable it is to visit.

data.name: TsaSafetyIndexDesc
data.value: Shows how safe it is for people to live or travel in a country, taking into account risks such as crime, property theft, social tensions, and general public safety.

data.name: VisaFreeDesc
data.value: Shows how many countries a passport holder can visit without needing a visa, indicating travel freedom and ease of international mobility.

data.name: Warning
data.value: These requirements represent the most common travel rules for this country. Actual requirements may vary depending on your passport, visa type, places visited, or length of stay.

data.name: YaleWaterScoreDesc
data.value: Shows how well a country provides clean drinking water and proper sanitation, helping people stay healthy and avoid diseases.
